---
name: Request a Missing Function
about: Request support for a function or operation not yet implemented in DAQIRI.
title: "[FEA]"
labels: "? - Needs Triage, feature request"
assignees: ''

---

This issue template is intended for requesting specific missing functions or operations. If you'd like to file a general DAQIRI feature request, please [click here](https://github.com/NVIDIA/daqiri/issues/new?assignees=&labels=%3F+-+Needs+Triage%2C+feature+request&projects=&template=feature_request.md&title=%5BFEA%5D).


**Missing Function/Operation Request**
A clear and concise summary of the function(s) or operation(s) you'd like to see supported in DAQIRI.


**Use Case / Motivation**
Describe the use case that led you to need this function. How would supporting it benefit your workflow?


**Additional context**
Add any other context, code examples, or references to existing implementations about the request here.
